response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song 'Dragon Screamer' from the on-screen text. Performed a web search for '"Dragon Screamer" Japanese and English lyrics' and found the song is by Da Pump (originally for Captain Tsubasa). Confirmed the performers are VTubers Ayunda Risu and Sakura Miko. Extracted the lyrics from the search results to populate the JSON.
response.global_summary: A choreographed song and dance performance by VTubers Ayunda Risu and Sakura Miko, performing 'Dragon Screamer'.

scenes.description: The VTubers perform the song 'Dragon Screamer'. Title card and credits appear.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(Why?) 胸に刻めよ 時代のリーダー
(Who?) 見た目よりかは かなりクレーバー
(Fool!) 乾いた心 すさむよりは
(Fight!) 時に泣いてみれば 見えてくる
明日駆けるのは
紛れもなく新しい自分
誰かのためでもなく
ただもっと上を目指せ
Dragon Screamer!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Why?) Carve it in your heart, leader of the times
(Who?) More clever than appearance
(Fool!) Rather than advancing with a dry heart
(Fight!) Sometimes try crying, and it will become visible
What you're running towards tomorrow
is undoubtedly a new you
Not for someone else's sake
Just aim higher
Dragon Screamer!
